zh: 那家店里有各种各样的衣服。
en: There are different kinds of clothes in that store.

zh: 你想用信用卡付款吗？
en: Would you like to pay with a credit card?

zh: 我通常用信用卡付款。
en: I usually pay with a credit card.

zh: 我们昨天参加了汉语听力考试。
en: We took a Chinese listening test yesterday.

zh: 你考得怎么样？
en: How did you do on the test?

zh: 有很多难题。
en: There were many difficult questions.

zh: 我们需要练习听力和口语。
en: We need to practice listening and speaking.

zh: 听力比口语难。
en: Listening is harder than speaking.

zh: 爸爸昨晚做了我最喜欢的食物！
en: Dad cooked my favorite food last night!

zh: 你可以把鸡肉放在这个盘子里。
en: You can put the chicken on this dish.

zh: 你能在超市买一袋米吗？
en: Can you get a bag of rice at the supermarket?

zh: 每个星期六，他做晚饭，我洗碗。
en: Every Saturday, he cooks dinner and I wash the dishes.

zh: 他昨晚煮了米饭，我现在正在做猪肉。
en: He cooked rice last night, and I am cooking pork now.

zh: 晚饭好了！
en: Dinner is ready!

zh: 我们老板今天不在办公室。
en: Our boss is not in the office today.

zh: 你收到他的邮件了吗？
en: Did you get an email from him?

zh: 我们收到了关于会议的通知。
en: We got the message about the meeting.

zh: 我们明天开会，到时见！
en: We'll have a meeting tomorrow, see you then!

zh: 到时见。
en: See you then.

zh: 我找不到我的钱包。
en: I can't find my wallet anywhere.

zh: 这是你的钱包吗？
en: Is this wallet yours?

zh: 这不是我的钱包，那个黑色的钱包是我的。
en: This is not my wallet, that black wallet is mine.

zh: 这个塑料玩具是她的吗？
en: Is this plastic toy hers?

zh: 不，那个抽屉里的玩具是她的。
en: No, the toys in that drawer are hers.

zh: 厨房里没有披萨。
en: There is no pizza in the kitchen.

zh: 我们没有咖啡，我们把它加到购物清单上吧！
en: We have no coffee, let's add it to the list!

zh: 这家杂货店没有很多麦片。
en: This grocery store doesn't have much cereal.

zh: 那面包看起来不新鲜。
en: That bread looks bad.

zh: 这些胡萝卜看起来很新鲜。
en: These carrots look fresh.

zh: 她是演员吗？
en: Is she an actor?

zh: 那个女人是一位著名的加拿大演员！
en: That woman is a famous Canadian actor!

zh: 她漂亮得像一朵花！
en: She is as pretty as a flower!

zh: 她的头发不像你的那么长。
en: Her hair is not as long as yours.

zh: 她是一个非常友善的人。
en: She's a very kind person.

zh: 你十年前住在这里吗？
en: Did you live here ten years ago?

zh: 是的，我们房子旁边有一个湖。
en: Yes, there was a lake next to our house.

zh: 我真的很想念那个湖。
en: I really miss that lake.

zh: 那时我只会一点点英语。
en: I only knew a little English then.

zh: 我的邻居教我英语和西班牙语。
en: My neighbor taught me English and Spanish.

zh: 你想中午一起吃午餐吗？
en: Do you want to have lunch together at noon?

zh: 当然，我很乐意。
en: Sure, I'd love to.

zh: 我想要一些甜的。
en: I'd like something sweet.

zh: 这里的甜点总是很优秀。
en: The dessert here is always excellent.

zh: 谢谢你的花，它们太漂亮了！
en: Thank you for the flowers, they are so beautiful!

zh: 昨天真是疯狂的一天！
en: It was a crazy day yesterday!

zh: 哦不，发生了什么？
en: Oh no, what happened?

zh: 昨天我邻居房子附近发生了火灾。
en: There was a fire near my neighbor's house yesterday.

zh: 我首先看到了火，然后我打了电话给警察。
en: I saw the fire first, and then I called the police.

zh: 警察终于来了。
en: The police finally arrived.

zh: 你多久去露营一次？
en: How often do you go camping?

zh: 我们每年夏天都在这里露营。
en: We camp here every summer.

zh: 孩子们讨厌打扫房子。
en: The children hate cleaning the house.

zh: 他明天有唱歌比赛。
en: He has a singing competition tomorrow.

zh: 吃太多冰淇淋对她不好。
en: Eating too much ice cream is bad for her.

zh: 你能告诉我去机场的路吗？
en: Can you show me the directions to the airport?

zh: 这是这个城市的地图。
en: Here is a map of this city.

zh: 机场距离这里两英里。
en: The airport is two miles away from here.

zh: 你不需要在这里右转，继续直走。
en: You don't need to take a right here, go straight.

zh: 继续直走到这条街的尽头。
en: Go straight to the end of this street.

zh: 我秋天会上大学。
en: I'll go to college in the fall.

zh: 你对哪些科目感兴趣？
en: What subjects are you interested in?

zh: 我对物理和生物很感兴趣。
en: I'm very interested in physics and biology.

zh: 生物很难吗？
en: Is biology difficult?

zh: 生物很难，但很有趣。
en: Biology is difficult, but it's interesting.

zh: 下一班去北京的飞机什么时候？
en: When is the next flight to Beijing?

zh: 这班飞机两小时后起飞。
en: This flight is leaving in two hours.

zh: 我需要订下一班飞机的票。
en: I need a ticket for the next flight.

zh: 火车即将开出。
en: The train is leaving soon.

zh: 我们要在火车上呆多久？
en: How long will we be on the train?

zh: 我们将在火车上两个小时。
en: We'll be on the train for two hours.

zh: 我感冒了。
en: I have a cold.

zh: 我应该打电话给医生吗？
en: Should I call the doctor?

zh: 我预约了十点。
en: I made an appointment for ten.

zh: 每餐后请吃这种药。
en: Please take this medicine after every meal.

zh: 你应该吃这种药，然后好好休息。
en: You should take this medicine, and then get some rest.

zh: 我的电脑不工作了。
en: My computer isn't working.

zh: 我应该寻求帮助吗？
en: Should I ask for help?

zh: 请问，先生，我的电脑不工作了。
en: Excuse me, sir, my computer isn't working.

zh: 机器现在工作了，干得好！
en: The machine is working now, good job!

zh: 谢谢你的帮助。
en: Thank you for your help.

zh: 明天是元旦。
en: Tomorrow is New Year's Day.

zh: 元旦你打算做什么？
en: What are you going to do on New Year's Day?

zh: 我想在明年开始时庆祝。
en: I want to celebrate to begin next year.

zh: 我的朋友和我会看电影。
en: My friend and I will go see a movie.

zh: 听起来很有趣。
en: That sounds fun.

zh: 我是你最好的朋友。
en: I am your best friend.

zh: 今晚我们能去散步吗？
en: Can we go for a walk tonight?

zh: 是的，让我们去外面散步吧。
en: Yes, let's go walk outside.

zh: 多么美好的一天！
en: What a beautiful day!

zh: 今天天气很好。
en: The weather is beautiful today.

zh: 我喜欢独自思考。
en: I like thinking by myself.

zh: 我们可以有一个更深刻的友谊。
en: We can have a deeper friendship.

zh: 你是一个很好的朋友。
en: You are a very good friend.

zh: 我很感激你。
en: I'm thankful for you.

zh: 我想要建造一个城堡。
en: I want to build a castle.

zh: 我知道一个可以建造城堡的地方。
en: I know a place where I can build a castle.

zh: 这将很有趣。
en: This will be fun.

zh: 我们可以一起建造一个城堡！
en: We can build a castle together!

zh: 城堡会很高。
en: The castle will be tall.

zh: 我喜欢你的想法。
en: I like your idea.

zh: 告诉我一个故事。
en: Tell me a story.

zh: 从前有一个王国。
en: Once there was a kingdom.

zh: 国王很有智慧。
en: The king was very wise.

zh: 在这个王国里有一个塔。
en: In this kingdom there was a tower.

zh: 这个塔很高。
en: This tower was very tall.

zh: 我会给你讲更多的故事。
en: I will tell you more stories.

zh: 我们去野餐吧！
en: Let's go on a picnic!

zh: 野餐听起来很棒。
en: A picnic sounds great!

zh: 我们可以在公园吃东西。
en: We can eat in the park.

zh: 这将是一次很好的冒险。
en: This will be a good adventure.

zh: 我们可以邀请其他朋友。
en: We can invite other friends.

zh: 他们也会喜欢的。
en: They will like it too.

zh: 你能看书吗？
en: Can you read books?

zh: 是的，我非常喜欢读书。
en: Yes, I really like to read books.

zh: 你最喜欢哪本书？
en: What is your favorite book?

zh: 我最喜欢冒险故事。
en: My favorite is adventure stories.

zh: 冒险听起来很令人兴奋。
en: Adventures sound exciting.

zh: 我们可以写一个故事。
en: We can write a story.

zh: 这个房子是我们一起建造的。
en: This house was built by us together.

zh: 这是我们最喜欢的地方。
en: This is our favorite place.

zh: 我们应该给房子的主人打电话。
en: We should call the owner of this house.

zh: 这座房子建于1950年。
en: This house was built in nineteen fifty.

zh: 所有的地板都是木制的。
en: All of the floors are made of wood.

zh: 他在踢足球时受了伤。
en: He hurt himself while he was playing soccer.

zh: 我会带他去看医生做X光检查。
en: I'll take him to the doctor so he can get an X-ray.

zh: 我的左腿疼得很厉害。
en: My left leg hurts badly.

zh: 你的腿可能断了。
en: Your leg is probably broken.

zh: 他在离开医院前做了X光检查。
en: He got an X-ray before he left the hospital.

zh: 你为什么今天这么早就回家了？
en: Why are you home so early today?

zh: 我们打算去航海，但下雨了。
en: We were going to go sailing, but it started to rain.

zh: 我们应该做什么呢？
en: What should we do instead?

zh: 我们做拼图吧。
en: Let's do a puzzle instead.

zh: 我可以打开收音机吗？
en: Could I put the radio on?

zh: 我现在不想放任何音乐。
en: I don't want to put any music on right now.

zh: 嘿，艾玛，我想你的电话在响。
en: Hey Emma, I think your phone is ringing.

zh: 你好，谁在打电话？
en: Hello, who's calling?

zh: 嘿，艾玛，是我，汤姆。
en: Hey, Emma, it's me, Tom.

zh: 你想明天出去玩吗？
en: Do you want to hang out tomorrow?

zh: 很酷，我很乐意。
en: Cool, I'd love to.

zh: 现在问你几个问题是个好时机吗？
en: Is it a good time to ask you a few questions?

zh: 对不起，现在真的不是谈话的好时机。
en: I'm sorry, it's really not a good time to talk.

zh: 这个项目有一个小问题。
en: There's a small problem with this project.

zh: 不可能按时完成这个项目。
en: It's not possible to complete this project on time.

zh: 我可能今晚会给你回电话。
en: I can possibly call you back tonight.

zh: 你今天早上看新闻了吗？
en: Did you see the news this morning?

zh: 珠宝店昨晚被抢劫了。
en: The jewelry store was robbed last night.

zh: 抢劫犯逃走了，警察找不到他。
en: The robber ran away, and the police can't find him.

zh: 我确信他们很快就会抓到那个抢劫犯！
en: I'm sure they'll catch that robber soon!

zh: 他们抓住了抢劫犯！
en: They caught the robber!

zh: 所有的珠宝都被警察找到了。
en: All the jewelry was found by the police.

zh: 你昨晚睡得怎么样，安娜？
en: How did you sleep last night, Anna?

zh: 你梦到去海滩了吗？
en: Did you dream about going to the beach?

zh: 不，我做了一个关于小丑的噩梦！
en: No, I had a bad dream about clowns!

zh: 小丑很可怕！
en: Clowns are scary!

zh: 我知道那是一个可怕的梦，但它不是真的。
en: I know that was a scary dream, but it wasn't real.

zh: 今天有返校销售。
en: There's a back - to - school sale today.

zh: 我们需要购买一些学用品。
en: We need to buy some school supplies.

zh: 我想买这盒蜡笔。
en: I want to buy this box of crayons.

zh: 这是我数学课需要的尺子。
en: This is the ruler which I need for math class.

zh: 艾玛只为这些笔记本支付了半价。
en: Emma only paid half price for these notebooks.

zh: 夏天是我最喜欢的季节！
en: Summer is my favorite season!

zh: 我计划今年夏天住在一个岛上。
en: I plan on living on an island this summer.

zh: 记得带防晒霜和太阳镜。
en: Remember to bring sunscreen and sunglasses.

zh: 如果波浪不太大，我们会去游泳。
en: If the waves aren't too big, we'll go swimming.

zh: 教孩子们如何游泳很有趣。
en: It's fun to teach the kids how to swim.

zh: 你是新来的，不是吗？
en: You're new here, aren't you?

zh: 我会把你介绍给你的同事。
en: I'll introduce you to your colleagues.

zh: 如果你有问题，他们会主动帮助你。
en: If you have questions, they will offer to help you.

zh: 隔壁房间是我们开会的地方。
en: The next room is the place where we have meetings.

zh: 在正常的日子里，我们在12点半吃午饭。
en: On a normal day, we eat lunch at half past twelve.

zh: 那个男人是明星吗？
en: Is that man a celebrity?

zh: 哇，他太帅了！
en: Wow, he's so handsome!

zh: 我认识他的未婚妻，她是一名伟大的演员。
en: I know his fiancée, who is a great actor.

zh: 她是一个友善诚实的女人。
en: She's a kind and honest woman.

zh: 他们已经在一起五年了。
en: They've been together for five years.

zh: 我们是城镇的新人。
en: We're new in town.

zh: 我们怎样到达市中心？
en: How do we get to the city center?

zh: 开过那座桥。
en: Drive across that bridge.

zh: 这条街有很多咖啡馆，经常很拥挤。
en: This street, which has a lot of cafes, is often busy.

zh: 这家博物馆已经存在六十年了。
en: This museum has been here for sixty years.

zh: 我从未独自旅行过，所以我有点担心。
en: I haven't traveled solo before, so I'm a little worried.

zh: 他们会在过关时查验我的签证吗？
en: Will they check my visa at passport control?

zh: 是的，请把护照出示给过关的工作人员。
en: Yes, please show your passport to the person at passport control.

zh: 这是我离家最远的一次旅行。
en: This is the farthest away from home I've ever traveled.

zh: 酒店昨天让我换了房间。
en: The hotel let me change my room yesterday.

zh: 第一周很令人兴奋，但后来我开始想家了。
en: The first week was exciting, but then I felt homesick.

zh: 那个塑料容器里面装的是什么？
en: What's inside that plastic container?

zh: 里面是草莓，但光吃水果不够当晚饭！
en: There are strawberries, but fruit isn't enough for dinner!

zh: 我不想做饭，我们叫外卖吧。
en: I don't want to cook, so let's order delivery.

zh: 这个应用程序是订披萨最快的方式。
en: This app is the fastest way to order pizza.

zh: 这个菜单让我好饿！
en: This menu is making me hungry!

zh: 是的，那个意面看起来不错，但味道会好吗？
en: Yes, the pasta looks great, but will it taste great?

zh: 快点，我们要迟到了！
en: Hurry up, we're going to be late!

zh: 我们还有几分钟可以复习考试！
en: We have a few minutes to review for the test!

zh: 哦不，我把笔记本落在宿舍里了！
en: Oh no, I've left my notebook in the dorm!

zh: 你怎么把这个单词翻译成德语？
en: How do you translate this word into German?

zh: 李老师告诉我们，如果有什么不明白的地方就告诉她。
en: Ms. Lee told us to tell her if anything was confusing.

zh: 你可以在网上查看考试成绩。
en: You can see your test results online.

zh: 我两点钟有一个工作面试。
en: I have a job interview at two o'clock.

zh: 你在哪里接受的教育，学的是什么专业？
en: Where did you get your education, and what did you study?

zh: 我在大学学习的是工程学。
en: I studied engineering at the university.

zh: 你以前做过类似的工作吗？
en: Have you done a similar job before?

zh: 是的，自2010年以来我在六家不同的航空公司工作过。
en: Yes, I've worked for six different airlines since 2010.

zh: 我们下周会联系你。
en: We'll contact you next week.

zh: 我们应该打扫厨房，因为它看起来很乱。
en: We should clean the kitchen because it looks messy.

zh: 好吧，上次是我用吸尘器打扫地板的！
en: Well, I vacuumed the floors last time!

zh: 听音乐让我打扫得更快！
en: Listening to music makes me clean faster!

zh: 我喜欢有洗碗机，因为它替你干活。
en: I like having a dishwasher because it does the work for you.

zh: 是啊，当我还是孩子的时候，我必须用手洗碗！
en: Yeah, when I was a kid, I had to wash the dishes by hand!

zh: 有客人的时候，父母会让我帮忙做厨房的事。
en: When we had guests, my parents made me help in the kitchen.

zh: 你不是每周一都在办公室吗？
en: Aren't you always in the office on Mondays?

zh: 不，我每周有两天在家工作。
en: No, I work from home two days a week.

zh: 艾玛，你穿了新衣服吗？
en: Are you wearing a new outfit, Emma?

zh: 本，我们听不到你说话，因为你把麦克风静音了。
en: We can't hear you, Ben, because you're on mute.

zh: 大家都收到今天会议的议程了吗？
en: Did everyone get the agenda for today's meeting?

zh: 是的，我有几个想法要和大家分享。
en: Yes, I have a couple of ideas to share with the group.

zh: 见到你真高兴，玛利亚，最近怎么样？
en: Good to see you, Maria, what's up?

zh: 嘿！我们自高中毕业后就没有聚过了！
en: Hey! We haven't hung out since high school!

zh: 你有没有放弃吃肉成为素食主义者？
en: Did you ever give up meat and become a vegetarian?

zh: 是的，我在农场工作后成为了素食主义者。
en: Yes, I became a vegetarian after I worked on a farm.

zh: 为日城高中最优秀的班级干杯！
en: Cheers to the best class of Sun City High School!

zh: 我们让DJ播放我们最喜欢的歌吧。
en: Let's ask the DJ to play our favorite song.

zh: 你感觉很热，我们来量一下体温。
en: You feel hot, so let's check your temperature.

zh: 别担心，九十八度是正常的！
en: Don't worry, ninety-eight degrees is normal!

zh: 我昨天头不疼，但今天疼了。
en: My head didn't hurt yesterday, but today it does.

zh: 你需要阿司匹林来缓解头痛吗？
en: Do you need some aspirin for your headache?

zh: 我生病时总去看医生，但我爸爸不去。
en: I always see a doctor when I'm sick, but my dad doesn't.

zh: 请遵循医生的指示。
en: Please follow your doctor's instructions.

zh: 科技改变了我们的沟通方式。
en: Technology has changed the way we communicate.

zh: 是的，很多人使用社交媒体与朋友聊天。
en: Yes, many people use social media to chat with friends.

zh: 不要在网上分享任何私人信息。
en: Don't share any private information online.

zh: 当人们读完你的博客后会喜欢你的！
en: People will love you after they read your blog!

zh: 本认为网上所有的新闻都是假的。
en: Ben thinks none of the news online is true.

zh: 我很担心社交媒体对我们生活的影响。
en: I'm worried about the effects of social media on our lives.

zh: 本醒着还是还在睡觉？
en: Is Ben awake, or is he still sleeping?

zh: 他正在镜子前梳头发。
en: He's combing his hair in front of the mirror.

zh: 我丈夫每天早餐前都要刮胡子。
en: My husband shaves every morning before breakfast.

zh: 这款牙膏让我的牙齿变白了！
en: This toothpaste makes my teeth white!

zh: 请帮你妹妹准备好去上学。
en: Please help your sister get ready for school.

zh: 我爸爸每天早上上学前都会亲吻我。
en: My dad kisses me each morning before I go to school.

zh: 女王住在一座古老的宫殿里。
en: The queen lived in an old palace.

zh: 公主打败了坏女王并获胜！
en: The princess fought the bad queen and won!

zh: 她的玻璃鞋在她掉落时被偷走了。
en: Her glass shoe got stolen when she dropped it.

zh: 王子迅速骑马向宫殿奔去。
en: The prince rode quickly towards the palace.

zh: 国王举起手向人民挥手致意。
en: The king put his hand up and waved at the people.

zh: 他们获胜后，宫殿里举行了庆典。
en: After they won, there was a celebration at the palace.

zh: 今天是本和丽莎的婚礼！
en: Today is Ben and Lisa's wedding!

zh: 婚礼什么时候开始？
en: What time will the ceremony start?

zh: 新郎和新娘通常会交换戒指。
en: The bride and groom usually exchange rings.

zh: 乐手们要等我们准备好才开始演奏。
en: The musicians won't start playing until we're ready.

zh: 我想留到乐队演奏完这首歌。
en: I'd like to stay till the band finishes this song.

zh: 他站在大厅里向宾客们道别。
en: He stood in the hall and said goodbye to the guests.

zh: 我想我被同事传染感冒了。
en: I think I caught a cold from someone at work.

zh: 我能在药店买到这种药吗？
en: Can I buy this drug at a pharmacy?

zh: 可以，但这种药服用时间不能超过一周。
en: Yes, but you can't take that drug for more than a week.

zh: 早晨服一粒，晚上服一粒。
en: Take one pill in the morning and another at night.

zh: 你受伤严重吗？
en: Are you seriously hurt?

zh: 我有几处划伤，但没有严重受伤。
en: I had a few cuts, but I wasn't seriously hurt.

zh: 我写完了论文，但还没有交上去。
en: I've written the essay, but I haven't handed it in yet.

zh: 别担心，我们今天有充足的时间。
en: Don't worry, we've got plenty of time today.

zh: 我们必须在周五之前交作业。
en: We have to hand in the assignment before Friday.

zh: 我有一个成绩不好，但我的平均分还不错。
en: I have one bad grade, but my average is good.

zh: 参加每次讲座是必要的。
en: It's necessary to attend every lecture.

zh: 在我的大学，许多学生在日本实习。
en: At my college, many students do internships in Japan.

zh: 我必须为了新工作搬到伦敦。
en: I have to move to London for my new job.

zh: 鲜花能让任何房间更漂亮！
en: Flowers make any room nicer!

zh: 把玩具放到后院去。
en: Put the toys in the backyard.

zh: 我们给浴室换一个新浴缸吧。
en: Let's get a new bathtub for the bathroom.

zh: 可回收垃圾是周一收的。
en: The recycling is picked up on Mondays.

zh: 克拉拉用滑板在城市里四处行动。
en: Clara uses her skateboard to get around the city.

zh: 我通常在上班途中顺路接玛利亚。
en: I usually pick up Maria on the way to work.

zh: 地铁在高峰期总是非常拥挤。
en: The subway is always so crowded during rush hour.

zh: 在城市里出行最好的方式是什么？
en: What's the best way to get around the city?

zh: 骑自行车是避免交通堵塞的好方法。
en: Riding a bike is a good way to avoid traffic jams.

zh: 不会吧，你真的忘了开会这件事？
en: No way, did you really forget about the meeting?

zh: 说真的，你在骗我吗？
en: Seriously, are you lying to me?

zh: 哦，我无法想象还有什么更糟糕的事！
en: Oh, I can't imagine anything worse!

zh: 等等，那是真实故事吗？
en: Hold on, is that a true story?

zh: 我已经更新了应用程序，但它仍然无法正常工作。
en: I've updated the app, but it's still not working.

zh: 我在哪里可以插电？
en: Where can I plug this in?

zh: 你可以稍后在咖啡馆给手机充电。
en: You can plug in your phone at the café later.

zh: 你知道有什么方法可以提高我的网速吗？
en: Do you know any way to improve my internet speed?

zh: 买新手机之前先备份你的联系人！
en: Back up your contacts before you buy a new phone!

zh: 妈妈，你能帮我安装这台打印机吗？
en: Mom, can you help me set this printer up?

zh: 这个国家在战后成为了民主国家。
en: The country became a democracy after the war.

zh: 在选举之前可能会有一些意外。
en: There may be some surprises before the election.

zh: 我们原本打算投票给他，直到听了他的演讲。
en: We were going to vote for him until we heard his speech.

zh: 一个国家拥有强大的经济很重要。
en: It's important for a country to have a strong economy.

zh: 选举结果完全令人震惊。
en: The election results were completely shocking.

zh: 工作面试让布鲁诺非常焦虑。
en: Job interviews make Bruno really anxious.

zh: 我从小就对蛇有恐惧感。
en: I've had a fear of snakes since I was little.

zh: 我的狗非常害怕雷暴。
en: My dog is really scared of thunderstorms.

zh: 我从未在湖里游泳，因为我有恐水症。
en: I've never swum in the lake because I have a fear of water.

zh: 我已经习惯了这里的天气，但我讨厌虫子！
en: I'm used to the weather here, but I hate the bugs!

zh: 这部电影是动画片，但不仅仅是给孩子看的。
en: The movie is animated, but it's not just for kids.

zh: 我们一起去看一部独立电影吧。
en: Let's see an independent film together.

zh: 那部电影的评价真的很差，不是吗？
en: The reviews of that film were really bad, weren't they?

zh: 看起来像纪录片，但其实是虚构的。
en: It seems like a documentary, but it's fiction.

zh: 为什么这么多电影以洛杉矶为背景？
en: Why are so many movies set in Los Angeles?

zh: 每个人都知道那部电影的结局。
en: Everybody knows how that movie ends.

zh: 你要为世界杯中哪支球队加油？
en: Who are you going to root for in the World Cup?

zh: 我来自墨西哥，所以我在这场比赛中为他们加油！
en: I'm from Mexico, so I'm rooting for them in this game!

zh: 爸爸看直播比赛时压力很大！
en: Dad gets so stressed when he watches live matches!

zh: 我们向一位警察询问了球场在哪里。
en: We asked a police officer where the stadium was.

zh: 凯文，你为什么为对方球队加油？
en: Kevin, why are you cheering for the other team?

zh: 我们在最后一分钟进球，赢得了比赛！
en: We scored in the final minute, and we beat them!

zh: 这是办理存款的正确柜台吗？
en: Is this the right counter to make a deposit?

zh: 您可以在自动提款机上进行这类交易。
en: You can make that type of transaction at the ATM.

zh: 对不起，您的信用卡已经达到了限额。
en: Sorry, you've reached the limit on your credit card.

zh: 要进行手机存款，请拍一张支票的照片。
en: To make a mobile deposit, take a photo of the check.

zh: 告诉我你的账号，我会把钱转给你。
en: Tell me your account number and I'll transfer the money.

zh: 您需要护照来开立支票账户。
en: You'll need your passport to open a checking account.

zh: 我迫不及待地想认识大家！
en: I can't wait to get to know everybody!

zh: 如果你愿意，我可以介绍你认识我的老板。
en: I can introduce you to my boss if you like.

zh: 让我介绍你认识汤姆，我们的新设计师。
en: Let me introduce you to Tom, our new designer.

zh: 你愿意让我给你看看我的网站吗？
en: Would you like me to show you my website?

zh: 在你离开之前，我想让你见见史密斯先生。
en: Before you leave, I'd like you to meet Mr. Smith.

zh: 期待很快收到您的消息！
en: I look forward to hearing from you soon!

zh: 哇，这些花通常不在这个地区生长！
en: Wow, those flowers don't usually grow in this region!

zh: 城市北边有一片山脉。
en: There's a mountain range to the north of the city.

zh: 东北部是这个国家最干旱的地区。
en: The northeast is the driest part of the country.

zh: 这是一个极度寒冷的地区，什么都不能生长。
en: It's an extremely cold region, so nothing grows there.

zh: 这个州的西南部只是一片大沙漠。
en: The southwest of the state is just a big desert.

zh: 那道带花生酱的鸡肉菜怎么样？
en: What about that chicken dish with the peanut sauce?

zh: 我们的金枪鱼卖完了，但我们有其他鱼类菜肴。
en: We're out of tuna, but we have other fish dishes.

zh: 我从午饭后就没吃东西，我快饿死了！
en: I haven't eaten since lunch, so I'm starving!

zh: 在您等候的时候，我能为您提供一杯饮料吗？
en: Can I offer you a drink while you're waiting?

zh: 嗯，对不起，我点的牛排是全熟的。
en: Um, sorry, I asked for this steak well done.

zh: 我们退回了那份煎蛋，但账单上还是把它算进去了。
en: We sent back the omelet, but it's included on the check.

zh: 她很安静，但她是重金属的忠实粉丝！
en: She's very quiet, but she's a big fan of hard rock!

zh: 专辑发行了，但评价很差！
en: The album is out, but the reviews are terrible!

zh: 自从吉他手离开后，乐队就不如以前了。
en: The band hasn't been as good since the guitarist left.

zh: 他的声音听起来太棒了，不是吗？
en: His voice sounded amazing, didn't it?

zh: 这场音乐会将令人难忘。
en: This concert is going to be unforgettable.

zh: 紧急情况下请拨打911！
en: In case of emergency, call nine-one-one!

zh: 昨晚不是又发生了一起抢劫案吗？
en: Wasn't there another robbery last night?

zh: 商店有摄像头，但窃贼戴着口罩。
en: The store has a camera, but the thieves were wearing masks.

zh: 那位演员被捕后登上了所有头版。
en: The actor was on all the front pages after he was arrested.

zh: 在法庭上，他一直声称自己是无辜的。
en: In court, he kept saying that he was innocent.

zh: 每周日，我们有每月一次的读书俱乐部聚会。
en: On Sunday, we have our monthly book club meeting.

zh: 我的朋友们想一起看锦标赛比赛。
en: My friends want to watch the championship game together.

zh: 我周末在学吉他。
en: I'm learning to play the guitar on the weekends.

zh: 我们都喜欢锻炼，所以我们通常在健身房见面。
en: We all like to exercise, so we usually meet up at the gym.

zh: 进入商店时，鞋子在左边。
en: When you go into the store, the shoes are on the left.

zh: 男士更衣室的队伍更短。
en: The line is shorter for the men's fitting rooms.

zh: 这些商品本周都在打折。
en: All of these items are on sale this week.

zh: 他购物车里只有大约四件商品。
en: He only had about four items in his shopping cart.

zh: 买那条裙子吧，克拉拉，活在当下！
en: Buy the dress, Clara, you only live once!

zh: 我今天不想花太多钱。
en: I don't want to spend much money today.

zh: 他在六十年代搬到了纽约。
en: He moved to New York in the nineteen sixties.

zh: 第一辆汽车是在二十世纪建造的。
en: The first cars were built in the twentieth century.

zh: 八十年代大家都是这么跳舞的！
en: Everybody used to dance like that in the eighties!

zh: 战争在1992年开始。
en: The war started in 1992.

zh: 这个国家在九十年代的总统是谁？
en: Who was the country's president in the nineteen nineties?

zh: 我休息了一年，背包游历亚洲。
en: I took a year off to go backpacking through Asia.

zh: 他买的是往返票，但他再也没有回来！
en: His ticket was round-trip, but he never came back!

zh: 没有直飞航班，所以这次旅行花了我们两天时间！
en: There were no direct flights, so the trip took us two days!

zh: 我把钱包落在货币兑换处的柜台上了！
en: I left my purse on the counter at the currency exchange!

zh: 我们试着搭便车，但没有人让我们上车。
en: We tried to hitchhike, but nobody gave us a ride.

zh: 感谢你在家里的帮助。
en: I appreciate your help around the house.

zh: 谢谢你在我度假时帮我照看狗。
en: Thanks for watching my dog while I was on vacation.

zh: 你主动提出帮忙，真是太好了。
en: It was nice of you to offer your help.

zh: 我非常感激这次美好的机会。
en: I'm so grateful for this wonderful opportunity.

zh: 你的礼物让我一天都很开心！
en: Your gift made my day!

zh: 你以前不是住在那个社区吗？
en: Didn't you use to live in that neighborhood?

zh: 我邻居的房子比我的小。
en: My neighbor's property is smaller than mine.

zh: 住在隔壁的人有一只狗。
en: The people who live next door have a dog.

zh: 洗碗机平时不会发出那种声音！
en: The dishwasher doesn't normally sound like that!

zh: 客房有自己的浴室。
en: The guest room has its own bathroom.

zh: 我住在咖啡馆旁边，所以我家总是飘着咖啡香！
en: I live next door to a café, so my house smells like coffee!

zh: 彼得一直在跟我说你们的橄榄球俱乐部。
en: Peter has been telling me about your rugby club.

zh: 你最近在哪里打网球？
en: Where have you been playing tennis these days?

zh: 当我看到她的漫画收藏时，我觉得我爱上了！
en: When I saw her comic collection, I think I fell in love!

zh: 你想和我一起做瑜伽吗？
en: Do you want to do yoga with me?

zh: 是的，练瑜伽是减压的好方法。
en: Yes, practicing yoga is a great way to feel less stressed.

zh: 我们有很多休闲活动，比如徒步旅行和绘画。
en: We do lots of leisure activities, like hiking and painting.

zh: 有些人我想让你认识一下。
en: There are some people I'd like you to meet.

zh: 抱歉打扰一下，你们在谈论烹饪节目吗？
en: Sorry to interrupt, but are you talking about cooking shows?

zh: 还有其他你想讨论的话题吗？
en: Are there any other topics you would like to discuss?

zh: 就像我说的，我的孩子也在那所学校。
en: As I was saying, my kids also go to that school.

zh: 等一下，你能再说一遍吗？
en: Hang on, could you say that again?

zh: 你还记得那年冬天河流冰封的事吗？
en: Do you remember the winter when the river froze?

zh: 是的，我们选择了放松度日而不是出去探索。
en: Yes, we chose to spend the day relaxing instead of exploring.

zh: 莫妮卡因为身体不舒服提前回家了。
en: Monica went home because she wasn't feeling well.

zh: 我听说你在比赛中看到了我的表哥！
en: I heard that you saw my cousin at the game!

zh: 李先生这个冬天已经感冒三次了！
en: Mr. Lee has caught a cold three times this winter!

zh: 你妈妈对那家酒店发表了一个奇怪的评论。
en: Your mom made a strange comment about the hotel.

zh: 开车开了很久，但我们安全到达了。
en: It had been a long drive, but we got there safely.

zh: 酒店的早餐只有一根香蕉，所以我投诉了！
en: The hotel breakfast was just a banana, so I complained!

zh: 瞧，我们显然不是故意错过航班的。
en: Look, we clearly didn't intend to miss the flight.

zh: 海关的那位女士让我打开我的行李箱。
en: The lady in customs made me open my suitcase.

zh: 我想知道报纸上那篇报道是否属实。
en: I wonder if that story in the newspaper is true.

zh: 总统会在下次选举中落败吗？
en: Will the president be defeated in the next election?

zh: 市长打算开放新图书馆。
en: The mayor is going to open the new library.

zh: 你听说那个被从丛林中救出的男孩的消息了吗？
en: Did you hear about the boy who was rescued from the jungle?

zh: 日本的地震是一场可怕的灾难。
en: The earthquake in Japan was a terrible disaster.

zh: 当我看到新闻时，我想知道每个人是否都安全。
en: When I saw the news, I wondered if everyone was ok.

zh: 这部卡通片是根据一部受欢迎的儿童电影改编的。
en: This cartoon is based on a popular children's movie.

zh: 我们目前只看了三集。
en: We've only seen three episodes so far.

zh: 我不敢相信这是最后一季！
en: I can't believe this is the final season!

zh: 这是他们制作过的最棒的烹饪节目！
en: This is the greatest cooking show they've ever made!

zh: 这位主演是不是我们在那部喜剧中看过的同一个人？
en: Is this lead actor the same one we saw in that comedy?

zh: 结局是一个大惊喜。
en: The ending was a huge surprise.

zh: 她出生的时候飞机还没被发明。
en: She was born before planes were invented.

zh: 七十年代，很多人迁移到首都。
en: In the seventies, many people moved to the capital city.

zh: 这座城市最新的高中建于1984年。
en: The city's newest high school was built in 1984.

zh: 2020年生活发生了什么变化？
en: How did life change in 2020?

zh: 许多人开始在家工作。
en: Many people started to work from home.

zh: 你为什么不加入我们呢？
en: Why don't you join us?

zh: 下次我们烧烤的时候你一定要来。
en: You've got to come over the next time we have a barbecue.

zh: 我想去一个有户外桌子的地方。
en: I'd like to go someplace with outdoor tables.

zh: 我们这些天得聚一聚。
en: We'll have to get together one of these days.

zh: 我过些天会打电话给你，我们好好计划一下。
en: I'll call you sometime soon and we'll make plans.

zh: 我得走了，我能稍后再给你打电话吗？
en: I've got to run, can I call you later?

zh: 你女儿和女婿真是一对可爱的夫妇！
en: Your daughter and son-in-law are such a cute couple!

zh: 我的岳父母很棒，特别是我的岳母。
en: My in-laws are great, especially my mother-in-law.

zh: 你们自婚礼后就没见过他们了，对吗？
en: You hadn't seen them since the wedding, had you?

zh: 他是一位著名艺术家的曾孙。
en: He's the great-grandson of a famous artist.

zh: 你曾祖父在这张照片里看起来像你！
en: Your great-grandfather looks like you in this photo!

zh: 我们搬到利马是因为我继母来自那里。
en: We moved to Lima because my stepmother is from there.

zh: 我们每年感恩节都会与大家庭聚会。
en: We meet up with our extended family every Thanksgiving.

zh: 真乱！
en: What a mess!

zh: 我让你收好那些鞋子多少次了？
en: How many times have I asked you to put away those shoes?

zh: 凯文，别再挂掉我们客户的电话了！
en: Stop hanging up on our customers, Kevin!

zh: 我很失望，他们从来没有我尺码的鞋子。
en: I'm disappointed that they never have any shoes in my size.

zh: 请把我的汤端回去，它已经凉了。
en: Please take my soup back, it's cold.

zh: 我在尝试预订，但网站太过时了！
en: I'm trying to book it, but the website is so out-of-date!

zh: 那对夫妇询问如何申请贷款购买新房。
en: The couple asked how to get a loan to buy a new house.

zh: 我们询问了房子值多少钱。
en: We asked how much the house was worth.

zh: 他们询问我们什么时候打算搬家。
en: They asked when we planned to move.

zh: 你有没有问销售员是否可以确认价格？
en: Did you ask if the salesperson could confirm the price?

zh: 他询问我们贷款需要多少钱。
en: He asked how much money we needed for the loan.

zh: 他们要求我出示驾照以确认我的身份。
en: They asked for my driver's license to confirm who I was.

zh: 我爷爷是穆斯林，他每天祈祷五次。
en: My grandpa is Muslim, and he prays five times a day.

zh: 你以前研究过犹太传统吗？
en: Had you ever studied Jewish traditions before?

zh: 是的，我在犹太社区长大。
en: Yes, I grew up in a Jewish neighborhood.

zh: 我进寺庙之前需要蒙头吗？
en: Should I cover my head before I go into the temple?

zh: 在我的宗教里，我们信仰不止一个神。
en: In my religion, we believe in more than one god.

zh: 当我还是孩子的时候，这是一个非常信奉天主教的国家。
en: When I was a child, this was a very Catholic country.

zh: 我建议你早点到达。
en: I would advise you to get there early.

zh: 我们建议您如果不能来上课，可以发邮件给我们。
en: We'd suggest you email us if you can't come to class.

zh: 我们现在可以解包，这样之后就不用再做了。
en: We could unpack now so we don't need to do it later.

zh: 我们早点到那里，这样在晚饭前可以放松一下。
en: Let's get there early so we can relax a bit before dinner.

zh: 我推荐烤羊肉配米饭。
en: I'd recommend the roasted lamb with rice.

zh: 房地产经纪人说现在是卖房的最佳时机。
en: The real estate agent said now is the best time to sell.

zh: 我们只是搬到城市的另一边，不是搬到另一个国家！
en: We're just moving across town, not to another country!

zh: 我必须在12月15日之前搬出我的公寓。
en: I have to move out of my apartment before December 15th.

zh: 她不喜欢这栋房子，但她喜欢这个位置。
en: She doesn't like the house, but she does like the location.

zh: 明天，我将签署新公寓的租约。
en: Tomorrow, I'll sign the lease for my new apartment.

zh: 租约是六个月还是十二个月？
en: Is the lease for six months or twelve?

zh: 抱歉打电话这么晚，但我有些消息。
en: Sorry for calling so late, but I have some news.

zh: 我所做的事情没有任何借口，所以我想道歉。
en: There's no excuse for what I did, so I want to apologize.

zh: 我很抱歉告诉了所有人，但我不能保守秘密！
en: I'm sorry for telling everyone, but I can't keep secrets!

zh: 听着，我犯了个错误，我很抱歉。
en: Look, I messed up, and I'm sorry.

zh: 劳拉，我没有任何借口，我该说什么呢？
en: I have no excuses, Laura, what can I say?

zh: 毕业后我会在教育行业找工作。
en: I'll find a job in the education industry after I graduate.

zh: 安东尼奥的梦想是成为世界上最伟大的运动员。
en: Antonio's dream is to be the world's greatest athlete.

zh: 我目前的目标是今年赚一百万美元。
en: My current goal is to earn a million dollars this year.

zh: 一拿到证书，我就会开自己的生意。
en: As soon as I get my certificate, I'll open my own business.

zh: 自去年以来换过机油吗？
en: Has the oil been changed since last year?

zh: 您的保险会赔付挡风玻璃的问题吗？
en: Will your insurance cover the problem with the windshield?

zh: 请帮我加满油箱好吗？
en: Can you fill up the tank, please?

zh: 但我昨晚已经加满油了！
en: But I filled up the tank yesterday evening!

zh: 车窗还没修好，所以你不能开车。
en: The windows haven't been fixed yet, so you can't drive it.

zh: 修前大灯我需要付多少钱？
en: How much do I owe you for the headlight repairs?

zh: 哇，那个巧克力蛋糕上有桃子片吗？
en: Yum, are those slices of peach on the chocolate cake?

zh: 你早餐想要炒鸡蛋吗？
en: Would you like scrambled eggs for breakfast?

zh: 不，我宁愿点一些更辣的东西。
en: No, I would rather order something spicier.

zh: 没有什么比新鲜青柠的香气更好的了。
en: There's nothing better than the smell of fresh lime.

zh: 我不建议你点金枪鱼沙拉。
en: I wouldn't advise you to order the tuna salad.

zh: 怀孕期间有些疼痛是正常的。
en: It's normal to have a few aches when you're pregnant.

zh: 你还有其他症状吗？
en: What other symptoms do you have?

zh: 我游泳后耳朵会痛。
en: I feel pain in my ear after I swim.

zh: 我们需要您的健康保险信息，谢谢。
en: We'll need your health insurance information, please.

zh: 现在开始治疗还太早。
en: It's too early to start the treatment.

zh: 您的检查结果明天将上传到网站上。
en: Your results will be uploaded to the website tomorrow.

zh: 我期中考试不及格，所以我必须通过期末考试！
en: I failed the midterm, so I have to pass the final exam!

zh: 我对自己的成绩单不是很满意。
en: I wasn't very happy with my report card.

zh: 我的字迹太差了，以至于我自己都看不懂！
en: My handwriting is so bad that I can't read my own sentences!

zh: 老师说我需要重写作业。
en: My teacher said that I needed to rewrite my assignment.

zh: 我喜欢大声朗读来练习发音。
en: I like to read aloud to practice my pronunciation.

zh: 大学弄丢了我的表格，所以我需要重新申请。
en: The university lost my forms, so I'll need to reapply.

zh: 我不必独自布置派对，对吧？
en: I won't have to set up the party by myself, will I?

zh: 在知道所有人什么时候有空之前，我无法安排派对。
en: I can't set up the party until I know when everyone's free.

zh: 这是他们的周年纪念日，所以我们应该盛装打扮。
en: It's their anniversary, so we're supposed to dress up.

zh: 我们应该带礼物，不是吗？
en: We should bring a gift, shouldn't we?

zh: 天然气价格出现了上涨。
en: There has been an increase in the price of gas.

zh: 抗议活动中的每个人都反对市长的决定。
en: Everyone at the protest is against the mayor's decision.

zh: 今晚的新闻报道了洪水警告。
en: There was a flood warning on the news this evening.

zh: 警方认为涉案人员不止一人。
en: Police think that more than one person was involved.

zh: 这栋建筑的大部分被摧毁了。
en: Most of the building was destroyed.

zh: 别看手机了，专心开车！
en: Stop looking at your phone, and concentrate on the road!

zh: 这座城市不允许汽车进入公园或其他绿色地带。
en: The city doesn't allow cars in parks or other green zones.

zh: 他们为什么不系安全带？
en: Why aren't they wearing their seatbelts?

zh: 前面那辆车最好加速！
en: That car in front of us had better speed up!

zh: 在学区内时速超过25英里是违法的。
en: It's illegal to go over 25 miles per hour in a school zone.

zh: 打扰了，您不可以在这里停车。
en: Excuse me, you're not allowed to park here.

zh: 山丘南侧的草完全是棕色的。
en: The grass is totally brown on the southern side of the hill.

zh: 这个国家的南部地区有野马。
en: There are wild horses in the southern part of the country.

zh: 这个地区有令人惊叹的森林和许多沙滩。
en: The region has an amazing forest and lots of sandy beaches.

zh: 这些花只在该州东部地区生长。
en: These flowers only grow in the eastern part of the state.

zh: 我从未见过如此美丽的风景。
en: I've never seen a more beautiful landscape.

zh: 如果我是他，我不会在考试前一晚外出。
en: If I were him, I wouldn't go out the night before a test.

zh: 理科部门今年使用新的课程。
en: The science department is using a new curriculum this year.

zh: 如果你负责课程，你会做什么改变？
en: If you were in charge of curriculum, what would you change?

zh: 如果我是你，我不会穿太华丽的东西。
en: If I were you, I wouldn't wear anything too fancy.

zh: 如果你是我，你会去哪里度假？
en: If you were me, where would you go on vacation?

zh: 在我的新职位上，我将负责员工培训。
en: In my new role, I'll be responsible for staff training.

zh: 如果我有更多经验，我会赚更多钱。
en: If I had more experience, I would make more money.

zh: 会议是在线上还是面对面？
en: Is the meeting online or face-to-face?

zh: 在我的第一份工作中，我的时薪很低。
en: At my first job, I earned a low hourly wage.

zh: 做兽医压力太大了，所以我转行了。
en: Working as a vet was stressful, so I changed careers.

zh: 我上周在科技会议上看到了你的演示！
en: I saw your presentation at the tech conference last week!

zh: 这个度假村的高尔夫球场很美。
en: The golf course at this resort is beautiful.

zh: 我们的酒店有水疗中心、游泳池和网球场。
en: Our hotel has a spa, a pool, and tennis courts.

zh: 他们的房间阳台上有热水浴缸！
en: Their room has a hot tub on the balcony!

zh: 那个地区有巨大的悬崖和壮观的洞穴。
en: That region has huge cliffs and spectacular caves.

zh: 过去五年里这里的旅游业有所增长。
en: There's been more tourism here in the past five years.

zh: 这里的氛围非常令人放松。
en: The atmosphere here is so relaxing.

zh: 他以有史以来最好的导演闻名。
en: He is well-known as the best director of all time.

zh: 这位演员从未在美国电影中主演过。
en: The actor had never starred in an American film before.

zh: 直到我读了他的传记，我才了解他的童年。
en: I never knew about his childhood until I read his biography.

zh: 在那个节目的所有演员中，她的粉丝最多。
en: Of all the actors on that show, she has the most fans.

zh: 你最近听到什么好的名人八卦了吗？
en: Have you heard any good celebrity gossip lately?

zh: 我的朋友认为索菲亚要离开这个节目了。
en: My friend thinks Sofia is going to leave the show.

zh: 如果你在烤鸡肉，一定要把它煮熟。
en: If you're grilling chicken, make sure to cook it well.

zh: 这些面条是用米粉做的吗？
en: Are these noodles made with rice flour?

zh: 它没有完全生，但中间还是有点粉红。
en: It wasn't completely raw, but it was still a little pink.

zh: 您想在苏打水里加一片青柠吗？
en: Would you like some lime in your sparkling water?

zh: 有机西红柿味道更好，不是吗？
en: Organic tomatoes are much tastier, aren't they?

zh: 我需要一打鸡蛋，但我只有七个。
en: I need a dozen eggs, but I only have seven.

zh: 在我忘记之前，让我告诉你关于安娜的派对。
en: Before I forget, let me tell you about Anna's party.

zh: 我只是想问你几个问题。
en: I just wanted to ask you a few questions.

zh: 等一下，有人在敲门。
en: Wait just a moment, someone is knocking at the door.

zh: 你在哪里学会怎么做的？
en: Where did you learn how to do that?

zh: 那么，你表弟弗雷德最近在和谁约会吗？
en: So, is your cousin Fred dating anyone at the moment?

zh: 顺便问一下，你哥哥最近怎么样？
en: Anyway, how's your brother doing?

zh: 这是退货的队伍吗？
en: Is this the line for making returns?

zh: 30天后损坏的商品不能退货。
en: You can't return any damaged items after 30 days.

zh: 我的帐篷坏了，我想换一个。
en: My tent is damaged, so I would like to exchange it, please.

zh: 您可以换货，或者我们给您商店积分。
en: You can exchange it, or we can give you store credit.

zh: 女士们先生们，非常高兴你们都能来。
en: Ladies and gentlemen, I'm so glad you all could come.

zh: 让我们为这对美丽的夫妇干杯。
en: Let's make a toast to the beautiful couple.

zh: 我很荣幸欢迎我们的下一位嘉宾上台。
en: It's my pleasure to welcome our next guest to the stage.

zh: 请注意，我有一个重要通知。
en: Please listen, I have an important announcement.

zh: 现在，我们将休息十五分钟。
en: Now, we'll take a fifteen-minute break.

zh: 哇，什么都能放进这个大车库里！
en: Wow, anything would fit in this huge garage!

zh: 每个卧室宽十二英尺。
en: Each of the bedrooms is twelve feet wide.

zh: 这栋房子的管道已经超过一百年了。
en: The pipes in this house are more than a hundred years old.

zh: 这些橱柜有足够的空间放我们所有的碗碟。
en: These cupboards have plenty of space for all our dishes.

zh: 这面墙长三米，所以沙发应该能放下。
en: This wall is three meters long, so the sofa should fit here.

zh: 他本来想换掉整个屋顶，但价格太高了。
en: He would have replaced the whole roof, but it cost too much.

zh: 如果我早点上床睡觉，我就会准时醒来了。
en: If I had gone to bed earlier, I would have woken up on time.

zh: 我可能搞错了，但我认为我们错过了出口。
en: I might be mistaken, but I think we missed the exit.

zh: 我有一个重要考试，但我忘了带幸运铅笔！
en: I have an important test, but I forgot my lucky pencil!

zh: 我对忘记你的生日感到非常愧疚！
en: I feel so guilty for forgetting your birthday!

zh: 我以前晚上从不会害怕，但现在会了。
en: I never used to get scared at night, but now I do.

zh: 从事如此危险的工作一定很可怕。
en: It must be frightening to have such a risky job.

zh: 我吓得几乎无法呼吸！
en: I got so scared that I could hardly breathe!

zh: 我们讲了鬼故事，所有的孩子都被吓到了。
en: We told ghost stories and all the kids were frightened.

zh: 为了面对我的恐惧，我自愿在工作中发表演讲。
en: To face my fears, I volunteered to make a speech at work.

zh: 你为什么不删掉应用程序重新安装呢？
en: Why don't you delete the app and install it again?

zh: 我还不习惯这个新软件。
en: I'm not used to the new software yet.

zh: 当我按键时，屏幕上什么都不出现。
en: When I press the keys, nothing appears on the screen.

zh: 耐心点，别一直按所有按钮！
en: Be patient and stop pressing all the buttons!

zh: 点击这里与其他用户共享您的文档。
en: Click here to share your document with other users.

zh: 哦，我的摄像头有点问题。
en: Oh, there's something wrong with my webcam.

zh: 你听说过第四街的小艺术博物馆吗？
en: Have you heard of the small art museum on Fourth Street?

zh: 我从未去过那里，但据说很棒。
en: I've never been there, but it's supposed to be amazing.

zh: 他打算带我们去看他最著名的艺术作品。
en: He was going to show us his most famous works of art.

zh: 我能给你读一首诗吗？
en: Can I read you this poem?

zh: 我以为你会喜欢这本短篇故事集。
en: I thought you'd enjoy this book of short stories.

zh: 春天时我们在学校里会画复活节彩蛋。
en: We used to paint Easter eggs at school in the springtime.

zh: 我们总是在前院放圣诞装饰品。
en: We always put Christmas decorations in the front yard.

zh: 秋天超市里总是摆满了南瓜。
en: The supermarket is always full of pumpkins in the fall.

zh: 我们来雕刻一个南瓜做杰克灯！
en: Let's carve a pumpkin to make a jack-o-lantern!

zh: 白酱里有乳制品吗？
en: Does the white sauce have any dairy?

zh: 它和牛奶很像，但实际上没有乳制品。
en: It's like milk, but it doesn't actually have any dairy.

zh: 您今晚有兴趣点一些开胃菜吗？
en: Would you be interested in any appetizers tonight?

zh: 我可以要一份培根作为开胃菜吗？
en: Could I get a side of bacon as an appetizer?

zh: 我们肯定还需要更多餐巾！
en: We're definitely going to need more napkins!

zh: 打扰一下，我们的鸡翅还没有送来。
en: Excuse me, we haven't been brought our chicken wings yet.

zh: 森林正在被破坏，这太糟糕了！
en: The forests are being destroyed, which is terrible!

zh: 正在采取什么措施来保护这一自然栖息地？
en: What is being done to protect this natural habitat?

zh: 今年这里将种植超过一万棵树。
en: Over ten thousand trees will be planted here this year.

zh: 全球变暖是当今最大的问题之一。
en: Global warming is one of today's biggest problems.

zh: 我们的土地正被工厂污染。
en: Our land is being polluted by the factory.

zh: 爸爸本来更想看一部剧情片。
en: Dad would have preferred to watch a drama.

zh: 我本来会选一个不同的女演员来扮演女王。
en: I would have chosen a different actress to play the queen.

zh: 音乐会怎么样？
en: How was the concert?

zh: 我喜欢，但我本来更想听不同的音乐。
en: I liked it, but I would have preferred different music.

zh: 我通常不喜欢马戏团，但这个真的很棒！
en: I generally dislike the circus, but this one is amazing!

zh: 这一带有没有你推荐的美发沙龙？
en: Is there a salon in the area that you'd recommend?

zh: 没有，我自己剪头发，因为沙龙太贵了。
en: No, I cut my own hair because the salon is too expensive.

zh: 我在绿街的一家店做指甲。
en: I get my nails done at a place on Green Street.

zh: 我通过看网上视频学会了自己化妆。
en: I learned how to do my own makeup by watching online videos.

zh: 婚礼上，我请专业人士帮我化了妆。
en: For the wedding, I got my makeup done by a professional.

zh: 我在为圣诞节后的大减价攒钱。
en: I'm saving my money for the sales after Christmas.

zh: 那超出了我们现在能负担的范围。
en: That's more than what we can afford to spend right now.

zh: 你需要支付运费吗？
en: Do you have to pay for shipping?

zh: 广告没有提到任何关于运费的信息。
en: The ad didn't mention anything about shipping fees.

zh: 使用折扣码后，价格非常合理。
en: With the discount code, the price is very reasonable.

zh: 我负担不起在这些昂贵的商店购物！
en: I can't afford to go shopping at these expensive stores!

zh: 体操是一项很难的运动！
en: Gymnastics is a difficult sport!

zh: 跳水区不应该有游泳者。
en: There should not be any swimmers in the diving area.

zh: 他们拥有联赛中最好的进攻。
en: They have the best offense in the league.

zh: 他们的防守比进攻更好！
en: And their defense is better than their offense!

zh: 你认为有人能打破他的记录吗？
en: Do you think anyone can beat his record?

zh: 没有人能打破那个记录！
en: No one will ever beat that record!

zh: 你需要请病假吗？
en: Do you need to take a sick day?

zh: 我的健身计划是每周锻炼三次。
en: My fitness plan is to do three workouts a week.

zh: 你喜欢什么爱好？
en: What hobbies are you into?

zh: 我非常喜欢体育和健身。
en: I'm really into sports and fitness.

zh: 我妻子告诉我不要吃太多盐。
en: My wife tells me not to have too much salt.

zh: 请签署合同并将其发回给我们。
en: Can you sign the contract and send it back to us?

zh: 嗯，你在合同上写错了我的名字。
en: Um, you got my name wrong on the contract.

zh: 你说的是那个专门处理投诉的人吗？
en: Did you say you're the person who deals with complaints?

zh: 你能给我一些关于如何写这份报告的建议吗？
en: Could you give me some tips about how to write this report?

zh: 我看看我能否回答那个问题。
en: Let me see whether I can answer that question.

zh: 稍等一下，我一会儿回拨给你！
en: Just a minute, I'll call you back!

zh: 你能请空乘人员帮忙吗？
en: Can you ask the flight attendant for help?

zh: 他们没有带齐所有的证件，是吗？
en: They hadn't brought all their documents, had they?

zh: 因暴风雨，所有来自中美洲的航班均已取消。
en: All flights from Central America are canceled due to storms.

zh: 你的航班怎么样？
en: How did your flight go?

zh: 自助系统不允许我们托运行李。
en: The self-service system wouldn't let us check our bags.

zh: 她很可能会坐至少六个月的牢。
en: She'll likely go to jail for a minimum of six months.

zh: 罪犯的要求是什么？
en: What were the criminal's demands?

zh: 他的要求包括一架直升机和一百万美元！
en: His demands included a helicopter and a million dollars!

zh: 陪审团无法达成一致，这让我非常惊讶。
en: The jury couldn't agree, which was a big surprise to me.

zh: 为什么对抗议活动的支持不更多？
en: Why isn't there more support for the protest?

zh: 人类学会了控制火并烹饪食物。
en: Humans learned how to control fire and cook their food.

zh: 到公元4世纪，他们的古代社会已经消失。
en: By the 4th century, their ancient society had disappeared.

zh: 尽管战争持续，两国之间的贸易仍在进行。
en: Despite the war, trade continued between the two countries.

zh: 他们赢得了战争，尽管他们的军队更小。
en: They won the war, even though they had a smaller army.

zh: 我希望现在没有下雨。
en: I wish it weren't raining right now.

zh: 我希望你能停止唱那首无聊的歌！
en: I wish you would stop singing that silly song!

zh: 你对自己的行为有遗憾吗？
en: Do you have any regrets about how you acted?

zh: 我希望我记得给你打电话。
en: I wish I had remembered to call you.

zh: 我希望明年会更好。
en: I'm hopeful that next year will be better.
